description: Known smoke-model rollout using pilot commands and no fitted actuator correction.
notes: No-fit baseline; mismatch is mostly actuator lag and mocap-derived initialization error.

description: Global affine discrete state-space fit x[k+1]=A x[k]+B u_cmd[k]+c.
notes: Open-loop rollout; validation measurements are not assimilated after initialization.

description: Nominal RK4 model plus ridge-fitted one-step residual correction.
notes: Residual corrects the practical gap between pilot command and actuator-realized simulator input.

description: Affine one-step predictor on mocap position/quaternion outputs.
notes: Scores mocap-output NRMSE because full velocity/rate states are not predicted.
